name: Count Inversions
description: Given an array of integers, count the number of inversions. An inversion is a pair of indices (i, j) where i < j but arr[i] > arr[j]. Use a modified merge sort to achieve O(n log n) time complexity. A brute force O(n^2) approach is not acceptable for large inputs.
constraints: Array elements can be any integer including negatives
Expected O(n log n) time complexity
Do not modify the original array
